message:
fix(normalize): add missing sudo flags (-s, -B, -D)

The sudo wrapper stripping was missing several flags:
- -s (shell): runs user's shell, passes command via -c
- -B (bell): rings bell on password prompt
- -D (chdir): changes to directory before running command

Without -s in SIMPLE_FLAGS, commands using sudo -s would
incorrectly normalize, potentially bypassing pattern detection.

Added 5 new tests covering these flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
